scenarios.description: attr(String,boolean) true overrides an existing non-boolean attribute value and marks it boolean
scenarios.precondition: Element has existing attribute "data" with non-boolean value
scenarios.expectedResult: attribute "data" is present with empty string value (boolean attribute)

scenarios.description: attr(String,String) is chainable and returns the same Element instance
scenarios.expectedResult: method returns same Element, both attributes set in one chain
pseudocode: TEST TC12 attr chaining returns same instance

scenarios.description: attr(String,boolean) false removes only the boolean attribute and leaves other attributes intact
scenarios.precondition: Element has a boolean attribute and a normal attribute
scenarios.expectedResult: boolean attribute removed, normal attribute remains
pseudocode: TEST TC13 boolean-false removes only boolean attr
